roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1203,42 PETITION FOR DISM FILED

/CAL: DEF PC 1203,42 PETITION/NP/X: CONVICTION DATE 5-2-13/X: THE COURTREQUEST THE MOVING PARTY SUBMIT A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION ORLIVE TESTIMONY/CONTD: DEF PC 1203,42 PETITION 09-03-20 IN DEPT 18    /

MO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;ADV/PERS CONSTL RT/DEPORT CLAUSE;PLD G CT1-487(A)PC/FCRT MKES FNDGS/ACC PLEA;TRL DATE 3/6/95 VAC;DA MO DISM REM CTS GRTDDA MO STRK ANY/ALL ALLEGS GRTD;REF APD/PSR;CONT 3/17/95 9AM S24 FOR SENT
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/DEFT INSTR 987,2//FAW/DEFT ARR//TN1/GTW/987,2/DOP//PC:940909/1030/S22/TR:941003/0930/S22
/CAL: DEFENDANT PC1203,42 PETITION/BE/MO DENIED/
/CAL: DEFENSE 1203,42 PETITION FOR DISMISSAL/NP/CONT/
A/JWV;CT1-SP3Y(M);CTS441D;$200RF;PAY $53,946,14 PER GC 13967(C)
CONT TO 3/31/95 FOR SENT AT 9AM IN D24
CONT TO 3/27/95 FOR SENT AT 9AM IN D24
CONT 3/21/95 9AM S24 FOR SENT & CALC OF CTS;DEFT ENT ARBUCKLE WVR OF SENT
CONT 2/16/95 AT 9AM IN S24 FOR PTC
CONT 2/15/95 AT 9AM IN S24 FOR PTC
CONT 2/7/95 AT 9AM IN S24 FOR PTC
CONT 1/31/95 AT 9AM IN S24 FOR PTC
REQ DEF,CONT 1/30/95 AT 9AM IN S24 FOR PTC
BWR-1/13/95;BF OF 10/6/94 S/A;BOND EXON;CONT 3/6/95 930AM FOR TRL IN D22CONT TO 1/27/95 FOR PTC AT 1030AM & MOTION TO CONT IN D22
O/C
CONT TO 102894 9AM FOR SAME
NO APP;BW NB;BF;O/C
DEFT CONT ENT GTW;CONT 10/6/94 FOR CNSL & TS NEW TRL DATE 9AM IN D22
MO RESET TRL & FOR CNSL-DEN;TRL DATE IS ON 10/3/94 IN D22 AT 930AM
DEFT CONT TIME WVR;CONT TO 9/29/94 IN S22 TO RESET TRIAL/CNSL
CONT TO 9/19/94 AT 9AM IN S24 FOR FURTHER PTC
